title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Ranbanka
subTitle: Rahul, an ordinary engineer, comes to Mathura with his wife and son. However, when a gangster gets attracted to his wife and forces her to marry him, he tries to find a way to stop his advances.

title: Zubeidaa
subTitle: Brought up by his maternal grandmother, Riyaz is on a determined quest to find and understand his mother. His search ultimately takes him on the complex journey his mother went through.

title: Sultanat
subTitle: Sultan, a brave warrior, tries to win the affections of Yasmin, a beautiful woman. However, his life turns upside down when his father is killed by a general, whom he swears revenge against.

title: Haisiyat
subTitle: Ram, a union leader, falls in love with the factory's new owner, Sita. However, management disputes create complications in their relationship.

title: Parivaar
subTitle: When a young girl is thrown out of her home by her evil relatives, she finds shelter with a poor street performer and his two children, a dog and a monkey.

title: Teri Meherbaniyan
subTitle: Ram, an honest man, falls in love with a woman named Bijli and goes on to help the people of her village. However, the region's corrupt leader, Thakur Vijay Singh, soon begins to plot against him.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
subTitle: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Aakhri Ghulam
subTitle: Bheema and his family live under the tyranny of their master, Daulat Singh. But, when Bheema revolts, his love for his master's daughter is threatened.

title: Jaane Jigar
subTitle: Two identical women who hail from different backgrounds fall in love with two best friends, Ravi and Vijay. Misunderstandings arise when Ravi and Vijay believe they are in love with the same girl.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Mera Karam Mera Dharam
subTitle: Ajay, a businessman, provides funds to Sarjuprasad to develop his hometown. When he learns that the money has been misappropriated by Sarjuprasad, he resolves to set things right.

title: Hiraasat
subTitle: An honest policeman who lives with his wife and a brother who is a student, gets implicated and arrested in a case of drug-trafficking.

title: Gaddaar
subTitle: A wealthy businessman's son manipulates a loyal friend into his personal schemes, but unexpected love and rising tensions threaten to unravel their lives.

title: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor
subTitle: A rich girl, Shalini, falls in love with an orphan, Arun, after he performs the poems she wrote using a pen name. However, things take a tragic turn when Arun marries the principal's daughter, Meena.

title: Kohram
subTitle: Colonel Balbir Singh Sodhi assumes a disguise to unveil the true colours of Veer Bhadra Singh, a corrupt minister. Soon, Major Ajit teams up with him to execute the mission.

title: Ghatak / Lethal
subTitle: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
